panels.title: FE Alive
panels.description: FE alive count. Verified: count(doris_fe_version)=1 per FE ✅

panels.title: BE Alive
panels.description: BE alive count. Verified: count(doris_be_fd_num_used)=1 per BE ✅

panels.title: Version
panels.description: Doris FE exposes the numeric version as the sample value and the printable version string as the version label.

targets.expr: sum(jvm_heap_size_bytes{type="used", job="$cluster_id", group="fe", instance=~"$fe_instance"}) by (instance) * 100 / sum(jvm_heap_size_bytes{type="max", job="$cluster_id", group="fe", instance=~"$fe_instance"}) by (instance)

100 - (sum(rate(doris_be_cpu{mode="idle", job="$cluster_id", group="be", instance=~"$be_instance"}[$__rate_interval])) by (instance) / sum(rate(doris_be_cpu{job="$cluster_id", group="be", instance=~"$be_instance"}[$__rate_interval])) by (instance) * 100)

panels.title: BE Disk IO Time (rate, by device)
